rulings.Case Title: MARION L STARR VS. AGNES C KOSEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion And Notice Of Hearing On Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Ccp Section 438
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 16, 2018, Line 5. CROSS DEFENDANT MARION STARR'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings CCP Section 438. GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is DENIED as to the trespass cause of action. All elements of this cause of action, including damages are sufficiently alleged. Motion is GRANTED as to all other causes of action subject to this motion for Cross-Complainant to allege each element of each cause of action and to plead fraud with specificity. Cross-Complainant shall also clarify whether she is seeking acknowledgment/imposition of easements and servitudes or she is seeking damages for breach of servitudes/easements as to the 1-3 causes of action. =(501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES AUSTIN ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 16, 2018, Line 6. DEFENDANTS RENKA PROP LLC, JULIA MWANGI, ANNE KIHAGI'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. DENIED. Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice is denied. =(501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: LEONEL R TORIBIO ET AL VS. RONNIE PILGRIM
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 16, 2018, Line 7. DEFENDANTS RONNIE PILGRIM, PEARSON PROPERTIES, INC., GRETCHEN PEARSON, JEFFREY MEARS, CATHERINE CROSS' DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer based on uncertainty is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to specify in which capacity Mr. Pilgrim is being sued in each cause of action, e.g. individual seller, principal of the seller, broker, etc. Demurer is otherwise overruled. Facts supporting delayed discovery are sufficiently alleged. =(501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-17-659243 WITH CASE CGC-17-562907
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 16, 2018, Line 8. PLAINTIFF KEYHAN MOHANNA'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-17-659243 WITH CASE CGC-17-562907. Hearing Required. By no later than 9:00 a.m. on February 16, 2018 Keyhan Mohanna to file and serve a declaration attaching copies of the following documents: Bankruptcy Court order cancelling the debt (Reply 4:14) secured by the operative deed of trust for unit #4 and (2) Deed in Lieu of Foreclosure for unit #4 referenced in Complaint (Complaint 4:20-25). Hearing Required to address the status of the rental unit (if consolidation is ordered) during the pendency of consolidated matter, e.g. collection of rent, etc. =(501/GLW)
